base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of link_pick_up_item — a character (playable) from 1986 legend of zelda. Item-pickup overhead pose — both arms raised holding heart-container / triforce-piece / big-item trophy. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Item-pickup overhead pose — both arms raised holding heart-container / triforce-piece / big-item trophy; used for 'you got the X!' celebration
